name: Vivek Kumar
title: Lead Mobile Developer · Flutter · React Native · Android · iOS
summary: Lead Mobile Developer with 8+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance mobile applications across Flutter, React Native, Android, and iOS.
Proven track record in leading teams, driving architecture decisions, and delivering end-to-end products in Agile environments.
Strong expertise in native-to-Flutter modernization, performance optimization, CI/CD automation, and maintainable code quality practices.
Hands-on depth in IoT, healthcare, logistics, and e-commerce domains including BLE/Wi-Fi integrations and real-time systems.

bullets: Led a team of 6 mobile developers and drove end-to-end delivery of cross-platform apps in Flutter and React Native.
Owned architecture, technical design, and code quality standards for scalable and maintainable systems.
Led migration initiatives from legacy/native apps to Flutter and improved release stability through CI/CD and QA gates.

experience.company: Carrier Technologies (via Drepp Technologies Pvt. Ltd.)
bullets: Delivered IoT-focused mobile applications for smoke alarms, CO alarms, water leak detectors, and IAQ systems.
Led migration from native Android/iOS to Flutter to improve consistency, scalability, and delivery speed.
Built BLE and Wi-Fi onboarding, OTA firmware updates, subscriptions, and Alexa/Google Home integrations.
Led a team of 3 developers and delivered healthcare applications across India, Colombia, Ecuador, and South Africa.
Implemented multi-tenant architecture and custom Flutter plugin integrations for wearable devices over Bluetooth.
Reduced application load time by 40% and improved stability through profiling, refactoring, and QA collaboration.
Upgraded Flutter applications, resolved plugin compatibility issues, and shipped Flutter Web capabilities.
Integrated healthcare devices including ECG, BP, glucose, spirometers, and other vitals hardware.
Implemented real-time chat, video streaming, and push notification features.
Led a team of 5 developers and managed planning, delivery timelines, and risk mitigation.
Delivered multilingual and multi-currency applications for global markets including Brazil and Azerbaijan.
Developed native Android applications for healthcare operations and field workflows.
Implemented order tracking, geo-location, barcode scanning, Firebase push, and payment integrations.
Built scalable solutions for diagnostics, pharmacy, and consultation use cases.
